age_range.evidence: The final sample had a mean age of 14.83 years (SD = 1.40).

countries.evidence: A three-wave longitudinal study was conducted with 3,184 teenagers from China.

fieldwork_year.evidence: Stage 2 (T2) was conducted in February 2025 and assessed difficulty describing feelings and experiential avoidance. Stage 3 (T3) was conducted in May 2025 and focused on social media addiction.

gender_split.evidence: Table 1. Descriptive statistics of population variables. Boys 1577, Girls 1607

sample_size.evidence: Following the same matching and data cleaning procedures, 3,184 participants provided complete and valid data across all three waves
